name: AdalFlow (LightRAG's LLM Application Framework)

auth.notes: Provider API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, etc.)

performance.notes: Minimal framework overhead; performance bounded by LLM API calls

agent_readiness.notes: LLM application framework combining training/optimization with inference. from adalflow.core import Generator, ModelClient. gen = Generator(model_client=OpenAIClient(), model_kwargs={'model': 'gpt-4o-mini'}). output = gen(prompt_kwargs={'input_str': 'Hello'}). AdalComponent for trainable LLM components. Trainer with AdalFlow optimizer (text-gradient-based prompt tuning). RAG pipeline components. Retrieval: FAISSRetriever, BM25Retriever. Datasets: eval datasets built-in. Formerly called LightRAG (name changed to avoid conflict with LightRAG vector-graph RAG). Smaller community than LangChain/LlamaIndex.

gotchas: Formerly LightRAG — confusing naming history; another 'LightRAG' exists for graph RAG
Small community — less Stack Overflow/Discord support than LangChain
API changes frequently as framework matures
Less production use than LangChain/LlamaIndex — fewer deployment examples
best_when: Research combining LLM inference with automatic prompt optimization/training
Teams wanting trainable LLM pipeline components
RAG pipelines requiring automatic prompt tuning
When DSPy's API is too low-level and LangChain too opinionated
avoid_when: Production RAG pipelines (LlamaIndex or LangChain more battle-tested)
Simple LLM applications not requiring optimization
summary: AdalFlow (formerly LightRAG) is an LLM framework combining inference with automatic prompt optimization. Generator(model_client=OpenAIClient(), model_kwargs={...}) for LLM calls. AdalComponent for trainable components. Built-in RAG with FAISSRetriever, BM25Retriever. Trainer for text-gradient prompt tuning. Small but growing community. Avoid name confusion: different 'LightRAG' exists for graph-vector RAG. Better for research than production — use LlamaIndex/LangChain for battle-tested RAG.
